svg.text: 0: Pick up kettle · 1: Position kettle to pour · 2: Move kettle · 3: Hold coffee carafe · 4: Grasp coffee scoop · 5: Transfer coffee to dripper · 6: Hold gooseneck kettle · 7: Grasp gooseneck kettle · 8: Lift gooseneck kettle · 9: Move kettle away · 10: Place kettle on table · 11: Pick up white bottle · 12: Pour liquid from white bottle · 13: Close bottle cap · 14: Place item on table · 15: Wait/Prepare for pouring · 16: Pour coffee · 17: Pour milk into coffee
